articles.description: Jose Mourinho is in final negotiations to become Real Madrid's next head coach, 13 years after his first spell at the Bernabeu.
articles.title: Real Madrid: Jose Mourinho in final negotiations to become next head coach

articles.description: Arsenal and England defender Ben White is set to miss the rest of the season with a knee injury.
articles.title: Arsenal's Ben White set to miss rest of season with knee injury

articles.description: Rory McIlroy is a different man compared with the tetchy figure who shunned the media for much of last year's PGA Championship, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: Relaxed and ripping off toenails - McIlroy's unusual US PGA preparation

articles.description: Britain's Jack Draper brings Andy Murray into his coaching team for the grass-court season after parting company with Jamie Delgado.
articles.title: Jack Draper: Andy Murray joins coaching team after Jamie Delgado exit

articles.description: With two games remaining of the Premier League season, Tottenham and West Ham are the two horses left in the race to avoid relegation.
articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Will it be Tottenham or West Ham who survive?

articles.description: Thomas Tuchel submits his provisional England squad for the World Cup, with Luke Shaw, Danny Welbeck and Alex Scott believed to be among the players named.
articles.title: England football: Thomas Tuchel names 55-man provisional World Cup squad

articles.description: Former Georgia captain Merab Sharikadze is banned for 11 years for violating anti-doping rules, with five team-mates handed suspensions of up to six years.
articles.title: Merab Sharikadze: Ex Georgia captain banned for 11 years for cheating anti-doping rules

articles.description: Jake Paul says his boxing career is "most definitely" in doubt as he awaits scan results on injuries sustained during his loss to British heavyweight Anthony Joshua.
articles.title: Jake Paul says boxing career is in doubt over injuries from Anthony Joshua fight

articles.description: Ecuador's Jhonatan Narvaez wins stage four of the Giro d'Italia, three days after being involved in a major crash which resulted in three of his team-mates abandoning.
articles.title: Giro d'Italia 2026: Jhonatan Narvaez wins three days after crash

articles.description: Ethiopian long-distance runner Yebrgual Melese dies at the age of 36 after falling ill during a routine training session.
articles.title: Yebrgual Melese: Ethiopian marathon runner dies aged 36
